    models/pallet_model.hpp

    models/parcel_model.hpp
    models/parcel_model.cpp
    models/delivery_unit_model.hpp
    models/delivery_unit_model.cpp
    models/break_bulk_item_model.hpp
    models/break_bulk_item_model.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(cargo_decomposition-qt-models PUBLIC
    Qt6::Core
    Qt6::Gui
)

add_library(cargo_decomposition-qt-widgets
    widgets/pallet_list_widget.hpp
    widgets/pallet_list_widget.cpp
